# FluentLanguage.net — LLM Context

> Isela Bingham is a professional Spanish ↔ English interpreter and document translator based in Stockton, California, with 20+ years of experience.

## About

Isela Bingham provides bilingual Spanish-English language services to legal, medical, and educational organizations across California. She has been an independent contractor since 2006, specializing in complex document translation and simultaneous interpretation.

## Services

- **Document Translation**: Medical reports, psychological evaluations, IFSPs, IPPs, IEPs, and legal documents — Spanish to English and English to Spanish.
- **Simultaneous Interpretation**: Conferences of 100+ attendees, consecutive interpretation, and sight interpretation, both in-person and virtual.
- **Legal Support**: Workers' compensation law, attorney support, court proceedings, precise legal terminology in both languages.
- **Medical Interpretation**: Healthcare settings, patient communication, medical documentation — HIPAA-compliant.
- **Educational**: IEP meetings at schools throughout the Stockton area.

## Credentials & Affiliations

- 20+ years professional experience
- Contractor: Valley Mountain Regional Center (since 2006)
- Contractor: Reliable Translations, Inc.
- Contractor: Now Interpreters
- Certified interpreter (legal and medical settings)

## Contact

- Website: https://www.fluentlanguage.net
- Email: ibingham@compuprotech.com
- Location: Stockton, California
